evidence.claim: Experience with NLP, recommendation systems, applied AI, feature engineering, and model deployment
evidence.source_text: Strong background in NLP, recommendation systems, and applied AI; comfortable across the ML stack from feature engineering through deployment.

evidence.claim: Built recommendation system for discovery feed
evidence.source_text: Recently, my main project for the last 18 months has been the recommendation system that powers our discovery feed.

evidence.claim: Improved revenue-per-search by 12% via learning-to-rank model
Evolved search ranking from hand-tuned scoring to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.

evidence.claim: Designed relevance labeling, feature, and training/eval pipelines
evidence.source_text: Designed the relevance labeling pipeline (mix of click-through data and explicit human judgments), the feature pipeline, and the training/eval workflow.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over academic theory
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
